# Guidelines
- Keep code and file structurred organized and clean.
- Application should be moduler
- Always use meaningful names for variables, functions, and classes.
- Always put a functinality in its own function, class, or module.
- Always write comments to explain the purpose and functionality of your code.
- Create Modern web layout for UI with responsive design, proper color and attractive design, and intuitive navigation.
